answer:
<think> The 1972 presidential election was between Richard Nixon and George McGovern. Nixon was the incumbent president and a member of the Republican Party, while McGovern was the nominee of the Democratic Party. I am aware of the major presidential elections in the United States, including the 1972 election. George McGovern was the Democratic Party's nominee in that election. </think>
<answer> George McGovern </answer>
